skills.name: arcads-spy-competitor-ads
skills.description: Research and download the top competitor ads from the Meta Ad Library. Videos by default, statics on request (media_type=image). Use when a user wants to spy on competitors, find winning ads, research what's working in their category, or build a swipe file.

skills.name: arcads-clone-hook
skills.description: End-to-end skill that identifies the hook of a video ad and clones it for the user's brand in one continuous flow. Analyzes the source video with arcads_analyze_media (returns hook end timestamp, beat-by-beat timeline, casting sheet, verbatim script, captions, Seedance 2.0 prompts), then optionally rebuilds it with arcads_generate_video_seedance_20, preserving structure and emotional beat while swapping in the user's brand identity. Optionally auto-sources a video via arcads-spy-competitor-ads when none is provided. Use when a user wants to find and/or recreate the hook of a video ad.

skills.name: arcads-static-ad-cloner
skills.description: Clone a static (image) ad for the user's own brand. Optionally takes a reference static ad — if none is provided, auto-runs arcads-spy-competitor-ads in static mode to source one — plus at least one real product image and a short description, then produces a brand-new static ad using arcads_generate_image, preserving the original's composition, hierarchy, lighting, palette, typography, and copy structure while swapping every brand-specific element for the user's product. Use when a user wants to recreate a static/image ad for their product.

skills.name: arcads-media-router
skills.description: Smart router for any generate/edit/repurpose request on an image or video. Dynamically introspects the connected Arcads MCP, reads its live tool catalog, picks the best-matching tool for the user's intent, and runs it end-to-end (upload assets if needed, call, poll, deliver). Defers to specialized skills (arcads-clone-hook, arcads-static-ad-cloner, etc.) when they fit. Use as the default entry point for any media generation or modification request not covered by a specialized skill.
